initiatives.name: Flagstaff Community Coalition
initiatives.description: A grassroots collective fostering mutual aid and community solidarity in Flagstaff. They coordinate direct assistance, resource sharing, and community care initiatives while building power through collective action and creating spaces for mutual support and community resilience.

initiatives.name: Flagstaff Community Fridges
initiatives.description: A mutual aid initiative fostering food security through community fridges and food distribution in Flagstaff. They coordinate free food access, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through community care and creating accessible spaces for food justice.

initiatives.name: Native Americans for Community Action (NACA)
initiatives.description: An Indigenous-led organization fostering mutual aid and community wellness through culturally responsive services in Flagstaff. They coordinate healthcare access, wellness programs, and community support while building power through Indigenous-led initiatives and creating pathways for community wellbeing.

initiatives.name: Flagstaff Pride
initiatives.description: A community organization fostering mutual aid and LGBTQIA2S+ solidarity through support networks and cultural events in Flagstaff and Northern Arizona. They coordinate community resources, social connections, and support services while building power through collective organizing and creating spaces where LGBTQIA2S+ individuals can live safely and authentically.

initiatives.name: Flagstaff Queer Collective
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support for LGBTQIA+ individuals in Flagstaff. They coordinate resource sharing, peer support networks, and solidarity initiatives while building power through collective organizing and creating spaces for queer community care and connection.

initiatives.name: Flagstaff Students for Justice in Palestine
initiatives.description: A student-led organization fostering mutual aid and solidarity through community organizing and education in Flagstaff. They coordinate resource sharing, awareness campaigns, and solidarity initiatives while building power through collective action and creating spaces for justice and community support.
